name: Motorola Solutions, Inc.
description: Motorola Solutions, Inc. is an American technology company headquartered in Chicago, Illinois, that specializes in public safety and enterprise security solutions. The company provides a comprehensive ecosystem of critical communications, video security, access control, and command center software. Serving government agencies, public safety organizations, and commercial enterprises globally, Motorola Solutions focuses on advancing safety and security through integrated technologies. By delivering infrastructure, devices, and services, the company fosters collaboration and operational efficiency, helping to protect people, property, and places in communities, schools, hospitals, and businesses around the world.
